author: Humanly
text: ADD (sibling instance of the same pattern): delivered_in becomes an extension-owned frontmatter field delivery writes at CLOSE.PRE — NOT the §11 derived 'git log --grep' query. Rationale: close deletes tasks/<id>.md, but a field written at close.pre is captured in the file's FINAL pre-deletion content, so bl show's recency-walk (bl-d7a5) surfaces it. A terminal-write field can't go stale (the task is gone), which was §11's only reason to keep delivered_in derived — so storing it at close.pre is cleaner AND removes the cross-incarnation grep ambiguity that id-reuse (bl-d7a5) would otherwise create on the delivery log. This is a §11 reconsideration: 'delivered_in is derived, not a field' -> 'delivered_in is an extension field written at delivery (close.pre)'. Same pattern as the worktree-path-at-claim.pre change above; both are delivery writing extension-owned frontmatter at the right phase. Needs a §15 entry.
